utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am telling you , something wrong ! My brother does not stay out all night .

emotion_cause.span: 1_something wrong ! My brother does not stay out all night .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Maybe we should check the trash chute .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross could not fit down the trash chute .

emotion_cause.span: 2_Maybe we should check the trash chute .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That is right , he almost could . Which is exactly how I got stuck there .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God ! Where the hell have you been ? ! !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ohh , out , oh God , I do not know why we did not think to check there !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I uh , went to a bar . And then I just uh , just walked around for a while .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: He hooked up ! He hooked up with someone .

emotion_cause.span: 12_He hooked up ! He hooked up with someone .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , I do not have to answer your questions ! Okay ? I am a big boy , I can do whatever I want !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: He hooked up ! ! Tell us about her !

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Ross you left you scarf in ... Hey you guys .
